title: Dynamic Content in GetSign notification?
excerpt: We are using GetSign and loving its functionality. I am wondering if it is possible to include dynamic content in the emails that GetSign sends to ask for signatures or inform signers that documents are ready for downloa…

posts.author: JAMatIHDA (Jeffery Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using GetSign and loving its functionality. I am wondering if it is possible to include dynamic content in the emails that GetSign sends to ask for signatures or inform signers that documents are ready for download.
